task.title: Implement M1 relay CLI bootstrap commands

raw.question: Expose login, workspace creation, and workspace token issuance as top-level CLI bootstrap commands
raw.chosen: Expose login, workspace creation, and workspace token issuance as top-level CLI bootstrap commands
raw.reasoning: Matches the proactive runtime golden path while reusing the existing cloud auth flow and a reusable @agent-relay/cloud workspace client

retrospective.summary: Added top-level login/workspaces/tokens CLI commands, reusable cloud workspace client helpers, and verified TypeScript plus the full test suite.
